serviceDescription: Amazon QuickSight is a fast, cloud-powered business intelligence service that makes it easy to deliver insights to everyone in your organization. QuickSight dashboards can be embedded in applications, require no infrastructure setup or management, and can automatically scale to tens of thousands of users.

templates.title: Reader Per User Pricing
templates.description: Per-user pricing is ideal for Business Intelligence (BI) applications and embedded analytics deployments with high individual session activity, and where end-users can be individually provisioned and managed.

templates.title: Reader Session Capacity Pricing
templates.description: Capacity pricing is ideal for embedded applications and Business Intelligence (BI) deployments at large scale, where average session consumption per user is low (<10 sessions/month) but aggregate session usage across users is high. It is required for: 1) Public sharing of dashboards on websites where individual end-users cannot be provisioned and managed, 2) Programmatic access and refresh of QuickSight dashboards on kiosk screens, 3) Whitelabeled QuickSight deployment in embedded applications (requires annual plan).
